params.name: Valor Badge
params.description:
The Apostles have seized the Twelve Temples of Hellas. In response, Earth's Will has mobilized the Hellas Expeditionary Force. All warriors are granted Badge of Valor. May these emblems inspire you to purge the Apostles...and restore light to Hellas!
—[Seal of Earth's Will]
